REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF AND THEIR COUNSEL ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IN GOOD FAITH VIA THE PHONE OR IN-PERSON PER CCP 430.41 NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 27, 2026 ON A DATE AGREED UPON BY THE PARTIES. IF PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON THE DATE, PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER IN-PERSON AT THE SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT (400 MCALLISTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102) ON FEBRUARY 18, 2026. WITHIN 10 DAYS OF MEETING AND CONFERRING OR MARCH 13, 2026, WHICHEVER IS LATER, DEFENDANT MAY RE-FILE THE DEMURRER IF NECESSARY AND PROPER. DEFENDANT SHALL NOT BE CHARGED A FILING FEE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

IF PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON THE DATE, PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER IN-PERSON AT THE SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT (400 MCALLISTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102) ON FEBRUARY 18, 2026. DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT KAI CHENG TANG'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE DEFAULT ENTERED ON SEPTEMBER 5, 2024, IS ORDERED SET ASIDE AND VACATED. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT MUST BE FILED WITHIN 15 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KAI TANG's Motion To Set Aside Default.

Defendant Kai Cheng Tang's unopposed Motion To Set Aside Default is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the default entered on September 5, 2024, is ordered set aside and vacated.

Defendant's response to the complaint must be filed within 15 days of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
